name: serialrun-example-plugin
description: Example plugin demonstrating ALL SerialRUN plugin API features — copy this to start your own plugin
author: SerialRUN Team
usage:
## Example Plugin

A reference plugin demonstrating ALL SerialRUN plugin API features.

### Commands

- **echo** — Echoes input text. Parameter: `{"data": "hello"}`
- **serial_send** — Sends hex data to serial port. Parameters: `{"data": "48656C6C6F", "timeout_ms": 1000}`
- **add** — Adds two numbers. Parameters: `{"a": 5, "b": 3}`
- **demo_progress** — Shows progress bar during a simulated task
- **open_file** — Opens file dialog and reads selected file
- **get_setting** / **set_setting** — Persistent config storage

### For Developers

This plugin is the recommended starting point for new plugins. Copy this directory, rename, and modify.

toolbar.label: Example
toolbar.tooltip: Example Plugin — demonstrates all API features
